name: testStartParallel
title: testStartParallel
description: Spawns a new thread to execute the specified function. Execution will start as soon as possible.

parameters.name: caplFunction
parameters.description: CAPL function to execute in parallel. The function's parameters must be specified as parameters of the testStartParallel call in the correct order. The return value type of the function must be void.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
